scripts.fix: prettier --write . && npm run frontend:lint:fix && npm run backend:lint:fix
scripts.check:docs: npm run check:markdown && npm run check:json && npm run check:yaml
scripts.lint: npm run check:docs && npm run frontend:lint && npm run backend:lint
scripts.typecheck: npm run frontend:typecheck && npm run backend:typecheck
scripts.test:fast: npm run frontend:test:fast && npm run backend:test:fast
scripts.test: npm run frontend:test && npm run backend:test
scripts.build: npm run frontend:build && npm run backend:build
scripts.precommit: npm run secret:scan && npm run check:docs && npm run frontend:lint && npm run backend:lint && npm run frontend:typecheck && npm run backend:typecheck && npm run test:fast
scripts.prepush: npm run test && npm run build
scripts.ci: npm run secret:scan && npm run format:check && npm run lint && npm run typecheck && npm run test && npm run build
